title: take photos directly from a workform
excerpt: I propose adding a feature that allows users to take a photo directly within WorkForms instead of only having the option to upload one. This would streamline the process, making it quicker and more efficient to capture a…

posts.author: cuevoso (Diego Cueva)
posts.cookedHtml: I propose adding a feature that allows users to take a photo directly within WorkForms instead of only having the option to upload one. This would streamline the process, making it quicker and more efficient to capture and attach visual information in real-time, especially for teams working in the field or on-the-go. It would also enhance the platform’s usability, catering to a broader range of workflows and making Monday.com even more versatile.
